concerns.text: Primary dataset (Knot Atlas) marked as 'NO verified source found'. Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) requires external citations to be verified against primary sources. Unverified data source renders the data resource infeasible as planned.

Compute feasibility claim ('Complete data download and invariant computation for 9988 prime knots ... within 2 hours') is likely infeasible on free GitHub Actions runners. Arc index (Birman-Menasco) and bridge number computation for 9988 knots is computationally intensive; pre-computed tables should be sourced if available.

Data completeness mismatch: Plan targets 9988 knots (crossing ≤13) from Knot Atlas, but Knot Atlas standard tables typically cover ≤11 or ≤12 crossings. 2024 arXiv paper cited for crossing 13 data, but download script targets Knot Atlas. Source for crossing 13 data must be clarified.

Multiple schema variants exist (knot-record.schema.yaml, knot_data.schema.yaml, knot_record.schema.yaml). Consolidate to single canonical schema to ensure data hygiene and reproducibility (Constitution Principle III).
